reasoning: The gap between Inter (1st) and Napoli (2nd) is 3 points as of March 30, 2025. Both teams won their Matchday 30 matches (Inter 2-1 Udinese; Napoli 2-1 Milan). The prediction market estimated Napoli's chances at 19% 10 days ago when Napoli was also 3 points behind but with 9 games remaining. With only 8 games to play, the 3-point deficit is slightly harder to overcome, pushing the probability down marginally. It is essentially a two-horse race now as Atalanta dropped points. Serie A introduced a Scudetto playoff for teams tied on points, so if Napoli catches Inter, they have a 50% chance of winning in the playoff, rather than being ruled out by goal difference. Napoli's form had dipped recently (1 win in 7 prior to Milan), and defending champions Inter are rightfully favorites. Therefore, estimating 16% aligns well with the math and recent market pricing.
